title: Eternal Trail a Soulslike
description: My first soulslike RPG Modpack that brings many overhauls and a new difficulty system.
body:
# 🛡️ Eternal Trail – A Soulslike Modpack

**Eternal Trail** is a carefully crafted modpack that merges deep RPG mechanics with the tactical challenge of Soulslike games. Prepare to explore a rich, immersive world filled with deadly foes, magical mysteries, and meaningful character progression.

---
### If you are a mod developer and do not want your mod to be included in my modpack, please contact me and I will remove it as soon as possible. You can find my contact details in my [Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Varamos)
---

## ⚔️ Core Features & Highlights

### 🧙‍♂️ Roleplay & Progression
- **Skill Trees & Leveling** – Build your hero using mods like `Puffish Skills`, `Default Skill Trees`, and `Apoli`.
- **Quests & Lore** – Story-driven mods like `Heracles` and `Modonomicon` guide your journey.
- **Origin Classes** – Begin with unique abilities using the `Origins (Forge)` system.

### 💀 Soulslike Combat Experience
- **Stamina & Dodge Mechanics** – Tactical combat with `Combat Roll`, `Stamina!`, and `Epic Fight`.
- **Challenging Bosses** – Fight epic enemies from `Cataclysm`, `DivineRPG`, and `L_Ender's Cataclysm`.
- **Weighty, Animated Combat** – Thanks to `Epic Fight`, `Soulslike Weaponry`, and `Simply Swords`.

### 🌍 World & Exploration
- **New Biomes & Structures** – `Terralith`, `Biomes O’ Plenty`, `Dungeons Arise`, `Yung’s Better Structures`, and more.
- **Magic & Dimensions** – Explore alternate realms via `Occultism`, `Blood Magic`, `Mahoutsukai`, and `Aquamirae`.
- **Immersive World** – `Ambient Sounds`, `Sound Physics Remastered`, `Dynamic Lights`, and `Shoulder Surfing`.

### 🛡️ Gear, Magic & Loot
- **Unique Weapons & Armor** – From `Epic Knights`, `Arthy's RPG Arms`, `Immersive Armors`.
- **Powerful Magic Systems** – Cast spells with `Blood Magic`, `Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks`, `Ars Nouveau` and `Mahoutsukai`.
- **Rewarding Loot** – `Lootr`, `Legendary Tooltips`, `End Remastered` enhance treasure and gear.

### ⚙️ Quality of Life & Performance
- **Modern UI & Controls** – Includes `FancyMenu`, `Modern UI`, `Jade`, and `Controlling`.
- **Optimized Performance** – `Embeddium`, `Cull Leaves`, `FerriteCore`, `Starlight`, `Dynamic FPS`, etc.
- **Controller Support** – Native support for controller gameplay.

---

## 🎨 Recommended Visuals

- **Shader Pack**: Bliss Shaders  
- **Texture Pack**: Alacrity

---

## ⚠️ Notes

- **Sinytra Connector** is used for Fabric mod support on Forge. Some incompatibilities may occur.

---

## 🙏 Credits

Huge thanks to all the incredible mod creators whose work made this experience possible.
